AuthPage.subtitle: Sign in with your account to continue.

OnboardingPage.title: Onboarding
OnboardingPage.question: Are you an advertiser or an affiliate?
OnboardingPage.advertiserDescription: Run campaigns and pay for performance.
OnboardingPage.affiliateDescription: Promote offers and earn from the traffic you drive.

TermsPage.title: Terms and Conditions
TermsPage.subtitle: Affiliate Network Terms of Service
TermsPage.section1Body: By accessing or using this affiliate network platform ("Platform"), you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you are using the Platform on behalf of a company or other entity, you represent that you have authority to bind that entity. If you do not agree to these terms, you may not use the Platform.
TermsPage.defAdvertiser: Advertiser — A party who creates and manages offers or campaigns and pays for performance (e.g. leads, sales, clicks) generated through the Platform.
TermsPage.defAffiliate: Affiliate — A party who promotes Advertiser offers through approved channels and receives compensation based on agreed performance metrics.
TermsPage.defOffer: Offer — A campaign, product, or promotion made available by an Advertiser for Affiliates to promote.
TermsPage.defConversion: Conversion — A qualifying action (sale, lead, sign-up, etc.) tracked by the Platform and used to calculate commissions or payouts.
TermsPage.section3Intro: Affiliates must apply to and be approved by Advertisers (or the Platform) before promoting any offer. Approval may be revoked at any time. Affiliates agree to:
TermsPage.section3Item1: Use only approved creatives, links, and tracking methods.
TermsPage.section3Item2: Comply with each Advertiser's offer-specific terms and guidelines.
TermsPage.section3Item3: Disclose affiliate relationships where required by law or Advertiser policy.
TermsPage.section3Item4: Not use prohibited traffic sources (e.g. incentivized, misleading, or fraudulent traffic).
TermsPage.section3Item5: Not cookie-stuff, use forced clicks, or engage in activity that artificially inflates conversions.
TermsPage.section4Body: Advertisers are responsible for the accuracy of their offers, payout terms, and creative assets. Advertisers agree to pay commissions owed to Affiliates in accordance with the terms of each offer and the Platform's payment schedule. The Platform may withhold or reverse payouts in cases of fraud, chargebacks, or violation of these Terms.
TermsPage.section5Body: Commission rates, payment thresholds, and payment methods are defined per offer and in your account settings. Commissions are typically calculated after the applicable conversion window and after any refunds or chargebacks. The Platform reserves the right to deduct chargebacks, refunds, or invalid traffic from earnings. Payment schedules (e.g. net-30) are set by the Platform or the Advertiser and may vary by offer.
TermsPage.section6Intro: All users must comply with applicable laws and must not promote or use the Platform in connection with:
TermsPage.section6Item1: Illegal goods or services, or content that infringes intellectual property.
TermsPage.section6Item2: Deceptive or misleading advertising (e.g. false claims, fake testimonials).
TermsPage.section6Item3: Adult content, hate speech, or content that violates third-party policies (e.g. ad network or payment processor rules).
TermsPage.section6Item4: Spam, malware, or unauthorized use of third-party brands or trademarks.
TermsPage.section6Outro: Violation may result in immediate suspension, forfeiture of earnings, and termination of your account.
TermsPage.section7Body: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and for all activity under it. We may suspend or terminate your account at any time for breach of these Terms, fraud, or for any other reason. Upon termination, your right to use the Platform ceases. Unpaid commissions may be forfeited if termination is due to breach or fraud.
TermsPage.section8Body: The Platform is provided "as is." We do not guarantee uninterrupted access, accuracy of tracking, or specific results. To the fullest extent permitted by law, we are not liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Platform or your relationship with Advertisers or Affiliates. Our total liability is limited to the amount you paid to us (if any) in the twelve months preceding the claim.
TermsPage.section9Body: We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the Platform after changes constitutes acceptance. We will use reasonable means to notify you of material changes (e.g. email or in-platform notice). These Terms are governed by the laws of the jurisdiction specified in our policies, without regard to conflict of laws principles.
TermsPage.section10Body: For questions about these Terms and Conditions or the affiliate network, please contact us through the contact information provided on the Platform or in your account settings.

AboutPage.title: About Us
AboutPage.subtitle: Learn more about ClickTracker and our affiliate network.
AboutPage.missionBody: ClickTracker simplifies affiliate and performance marketing by connecting advertisers with affiliates in one platform. We help brands scale through partner-driven campaigns and help publishers earn from the traffic they drive.
AboutPage.whatWeDoBody: We provide tracking, reporting, and payment tools so advertisers can run offers and affiliates can promote them with clear terms and timely payouts. Our goal is transparency, reliability, and ease of use for everyone on the network.

ContactPage.title: Contact Us
ContactPage.subtitle: Get in touch with our team.
ContactPage.description: For questions about the platform, your account, or partnerships, please reach out using the contact details in your account settings or the support channel provided after sign-in.
ContactPage.supportNote: If you have not yet signed in, use the sign-in page to access your dashboard and support options.

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.section1Body: This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, and share information when you use our platform and services, including our affiliate and performance marketing programs. We are committed to transparency with our users, publishers, advertisers, and affiliate partners. By using our services, you agree to the practices described below.
PrivacyPage.section2Item1: Account and profile data: Name, email address, company name, payment and tax information (for publishers and advertisers), and other details you provide when registering or updating your account.
PrivacyPage.section2Item2: Usage and performance data: Clicks, conversions, impressions, traffic sources, campaign and creative performance, and other metrics necessary to operate our affiliate and advertising programs.
PrivacyPage.section2Item3: Device and technical data: IP address, browser type and version, device type, operating system, and similar technical identifiers used for fraud prevention, analytics, and attribution.
PrivacyPage.section2Item4: Cookies and similar technologies: We and our partners use cookies, pixels, and similar technologies to recognize you, attribute actions to campaigns, prevent fraud, and support marketing and analytics. See Section 6 for more detail.
PrivacyPage.section3Intro: We use the information we collect to:
PrivacyPage.section3Item1: Provide, operate, and improve our platform and services
PrivacyPage.section3Item2: Track and attribute conversions, commissions, and performance for our affiliate and advertising programs
PrivacyPage.section3Item3: Detect and prevent fraud, abuse, and invalid traffic
PrivacyPage.section3Item4: Analyze trends and usage to improve our products
PrivacyPage.section3Item5: Send service-related and marketing communications (where permitted and with your consent where required)
PrivacyPage.section3Item6: Comply with legal obligations and enforce our terms
PrivacyPage.section4Intro: Our platform supports affiliate and performance marketing. In that context:
PrivacyPage.section4Item1: Tracking links and cookies: When you click links or ads in affiliate or partner content, we or our partners may set cookies or use other identifiers to attribute visits and conversions to the correct publisher or campaign.
PrivacyPage.section4Item2: Third-party networks: We may work with affiliate networks, ad networks, and demand-side platforms. Those partners may collect and use data in accordance with their own privacy policies when you interact with their content or tracking.
PrivacyPage.section4Item3: Commission and reporting: We use collected data to calculate commissions, report performance to advertisers and publishers, and resolve disputes.
PrivacyPage.section4Outro: If you are a publisher or advertiser, we process your data as necessary to perform our contract with you and to operate our affiliate and marketing programs.
PrivacyPage.section5Body: We may send you marketing emails or other communications about our services, offers, and industry updates. Where required by law, we will obtain your consent before sending marketing. You can opt out at any time using the unsubscribe link in our emails or by contacting us. Opting out of marketing does not affect service-related or transactional communications.
PrivacyPage.section6Intro: We use cookies, pixels, local storage, and similar technologies to:
PrivacyPage.section6Item1: Keep you signed in and remember your preferences
PrivacyPage.section6Item2: Attribute clicks and conversions in our affiliate and advertising programs
PrivacyPage.section6Item3: Analyze site usage and improve our services
PrivacyPage.section6Item5: Deliver and measure ads (including retargeting) when we or our partners serve advertising
PrivacyPage.section6Outro: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Note that limiting or blocking cookies may affect attribution, login persistence, and some features of our platform.
PrivacyPage.section7Item1: Advertisers and publishers: Aggregated or attributed performance data as needed to run our affiliate and advertising programs
PrivacyPage.section7Item2: Service providers: Hosting, analytics, payment processing, email delivery, and other vendors that process data on our behalf under contract
PrivacyPage.section7Item3: Affiliate and ad partners: Where you interact with their links or ads, they may receive data in line with their policies and our agreements
PrivacyPage.section7Item4: Legal and safety: When required by law, to protect rights and safety, or to enforce our terms
PrivacyPage.section7Outro: We do not sell your personal information in the traditional sense. Where we use data for targeted advertising or share it with ad partners in ways that may qualify as a "sale" or "share" under certain privacy laws (e.g., some U.S. state laws), we will honor opt-out requests as described in Section 9.
PrivacyPage.section8Body: We retain your information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services, comply with legal obligations (e.g., tax, anti-fraud), resolve disputes, and enforce our agreements. Attribution and performance data may be retained for longer periods to support reporting and commission calculations in line with our program terms.
PrivacyPage.section9Intro: Depending on where you live, you may have the right to:
PrivacyPage.section9Item1: Access and receive a copy of your personal data
PrivacyPage.section9Item5: Opt out of the "sale" or "sharing" of your data for targeted advertising (e.g., via a Do Not Sell/Share link or preference center, where applicable)
PrivacyPage.section9Item6: Object to or restrict certain processing
PrivacyPage.section9Outro: To exercise these rights or ask questions, contact us using the details in Section 12. We will not discriminate against you for exercising your privacy rights. If you are in the EEA or UK, you may also have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.
PrivacyPage.section10Body: Your information may be processed in countries other than your own. We take steps to ensure that such transfers are protected by appropriate safeguards (e.g., standard contractual clauses) where required by law. Our services are not directed at children under the age of 16 (or higher where applicable). We do not knowingly collect personal information from children; if we learn we have done so, we will delete it promptly.
PrivacyPage.section11Body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will post the revised version on this page and update the "Last updated" date. For material changes, we may provide additional notice (e.g., by email or a notice in our platform). Continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
PrivacyPage.section12Body: For privacy-related requests, questions, or complaints, please contact us at the email or address provided in our website footer or in your account settings. We will respond in accordance with applicable law.

HomePage.title: Home Page
HomePage.welcomeSubtitle: Manage campaigns, track performance, and grow with partners—all in one place.
HomePage.joinAsAdvertiserDescription: Run campaigns and pay for performance. Add offers, approve affiliates, and track conversions.
HomePage.joinAsAffiliateDescription: Promote offers and earn. Apply to programs, get links, and get paid for the traffic you drive.
